# Aira — 20 Full Reel Concepts · Set 4 (Concepts 51–70) · Sys Directive 3 v3.16-VP

<aside>
🎬

Set 4 — Concepts 51–70. 20 fresh production-ready reel concepts at maximum CONCEPT 61+ depth — every section written in full on every frame, all-new themes and transform media (nothing reused from Sets 1–3). IDENTITY LOCK is a placeholder by design: each frame reads AIRA — (paste reference sheet) so you drop the locked character/face reference into Nano Banana Pro; every other layer is fully detailed. Locked to Sys Directive 3 v3.16-VP. Tools: Nano Banana Pro (stills) + VEO 3.1 (video) only. Each concept ends with a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief (external audio layer — low and subtle under VO/SFX, never full). Aira is adult, non-sexualized; hair colour + base texture never change.

</aside>

---

# CONCEPT 51 — STAINED-GLASS CATHEDRAL / LUMINOUS JEWEL-LIGHT

Title: Pillar 4 — Opulent Jewel-Tone

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — stained-glass light-fracture transform

Hero Product: "Lumière Sacrée" radiance drops — a faceted jewel-cut glass vial with a stained-glass-tint gradient and a brushed rose-gold collar

Setting: a vast sunlit cathedral nave, towering stained-glass windows throwing jewel-coloured light-shafts across pale stone, a long central runway of coloured light on the floor

Wardrobe: deep sapphire silk-velvet column gown (start) → transforms via stained-glass light-fracture into a jewel-mosaic beaded gown

Hair: Sleek Low Chignon, centre part

Makeup: Luminous Jewel-Glow (lit champagne highlight, soft berry lip)

Movement: processional light-shaft walk → stained-glass light-fracture transform → product radiance-halo hero

Concept Line: "lit like a cathedral"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: REVERENT → radiant

Composition: symmetrical cathedral nave, jewel-light shafts, central runway of light

Grade: luminous cinematic jewel-tone — deep saturated sapphire / ruby / emerald light with warm pale stone, rich airy blacks (cinematic lane)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "lit like a cathedral." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + sapphire gown; end = emerged jewel-mosaic look, new AND clearly her; the light-fracture covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light and fabric obey real physics.

---

## Frame 1 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

WARDROBE: a deep sapphire silk-velvet column gown, floor-length and fully modest, a soft draped cowl at the neck and long clean sleeves, the velvet pile drinking the jewel-light into rich blue shadow with a soft travelling sheen along each fold; a single fine brushed rose-gold cuff at the wrist; fabric immaculate, weighted and flawless with no lint or creasing.

HAIR (Sleek Low Chignon): a centre part sweeping back into a polished low knot at the nape, the surface glossy and smooth with zero flyaways and a clean hairline, a few soft face-framing strands left loose; healthy high-shine with real strand separation under the gloss, hair colour locked to the reference.

MAKEUP (Luminous Jewel-Glow): a luminous satin base, a softly smoked warm-taupe lid with fluttery natural lashes, brushed-up brows, a lit champagne highlight stacked on the cheekbone, brow-bone and cupid's bow, a soft berry-stained satin lip, a diffused rosy blush; skin kept dewy and real with visible pores and fine vellus texture (glow from light, never plastic).

HANDS & NAILS: both hands cradling the faceted "Lumière Sacrée" vial at the heart, fingertips resting light on the cut glass with natural nail-bed colour; almond nails in a clean glazed rose-nude gloss, neat cuticles.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: a reverent wonder-struck calm — lips softly parted on a held breath, eyes lifted toward a towering window with quiet awe, brows lifted a hair; a clean jewel-coloured catchlight in each eye; the faintest dreamlike stillness, alive not frozen.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: standing tall facing down the nave, three-quarter to camera, the vial held to the heart, spine long, one shoulder dropped, weight settled and serene with the velvet falling clean — living stillness.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) broad jewel-coloured light-shafts drifting almost imperceptibly with slow turning dust; (2) a loose face-framing strand swaying a few millimetres in the cool air; (3) the velvet folds breathing with a slow highlight shift as she inhales; (4) fine stone-dust motes turning inside the coloured shafts; (5) chest rising on a slow awed breath; (6) faceted speculars crawling across the cut vial as it is held; (7) a soft coloured caustic thrown by the glass dancing on the back of her hand; (8) a slow reverent blink completing.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the faceted vial and her cradling hands at the heart, tack sharp, throwing tiny jewel caustics. MIDGROUND — Aira centred in a single bright light-shaft. BACKGROUND — towering stained-glass windows, jewel shafts crossing pale stone, a long central runway of coloured light on the floor receding to a soft glow.

LIGHTING: KEY — a broad jewel-coloured window shaft as the motivated key wrapping her face. FILL — a soft ambient stone-bounce keeping shadows gentle. RIM — a cool delicate backlight separating her hair and shoulder from the nave. PRACTICAL — the stained-glass windows glowing as in-frame sources plus distant candle-banks. SEPARATION — the bright shaft haloing her silhouette. BOUNCE — a warm card lifting the vial's cut facets.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; full-figure-to-waist symmetrical, the central light runway receding behind her, 14% headroom, generous reverent negative space.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A symmetrical full-figure-to-waist hero with about 14% headroom, standing in the central jewel-light shaft with the light runway receding behind. Her torso at a three-quarter angle to camera, the product held to the heart. Camera at a medium-full establishing distance, clean negative space; she holds the centre as the symmetrical hero, the figure reading from roughly the waist up, near-frontal in a poised three-quarter. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm, f/2.0; her face and the vial tack sharp, the nave softly glowing, coloured round bokeh off the distant candle-banks; gentle bloom on the light-shafts and tiny refraction sparkles off the glass.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: cinematic cathedral-fashion hero (a luxury fragrance-campaign opening) — symmetrical, jewel-lit, reverent and phone-stopping.

ATMOSPHERE: hushed, sacred, luminous — the breath before the light transforms her.

COLOR GRADE: luminous cinematic jewel-tone — deep saturated sapphire, ruby and emerald shafts, warm pale stone, rich but airy blacks, soft bloom (cinematic lane, not the bright-commercial override).

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: the cut vial refracts tiny jewel caustics and throws pin-sharp speculars; the silk-velvet shows real pile direction and a soft sheen shift across the folds; glass-skin micro-texture with soft peach-fuzz catching the rim; coloured dust drifts believably through the shafts; a faint pool of coloured light rests on the stone at her feet.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, low-res patches, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI-generated artifacts, watermarks, signature, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts at ankle/knee/wrist/elbow/neck, amputated fingertips, cross-eyed, lazy eye, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mismatched footwear, mannequin-stiff posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, garbled label text, immodest framing, frozen dust, dead window glow.

## Frame 1 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: full-figure-to-waist symmetrical hero standing in the central jewel-light shaft.

LENS: 35mm, f/2.0.

SHOT BREAKDOWN (timed, 6s · real-time, continuous energetic motion — never slow-motion, never a static hold; expression eye-led and identity-safe):
- [00:00–00:02] Full-figure-to-waist symmetrical hero in the central jewel-shaft: a slow reverent push-in is already gliding down the nave as she cradles the faceted vial to her heart, the sapphire velvet breathing; eyes lifting to the towering window in quiet awe.
- [00:02–00:04] The push continues as she takes one slow processional step into the brightest shaft, coloured light washing up her gown; lips parting on a held breath, gaze tracing the glass.
- [00:04–00:06] She settles tall in the shaft, the vial glinting at her heart, a serene reverent calm holding in her eyes as a soft jewel caustic dances on the back of her hand.

LIGHTING: jewel-coloured window shaft as the motivated key, cool rim, soft stone fill; the shaft brightening as she steps into it.

ENVIRONMENT: a vast cathedral nave, stained-glass windows, crossing coloured light-shafts, slow turning dust, distant candle-banks.

AUDIO: diegetic-plus-design, no spoken word this frame. Ambient bed — a deep soft cathedral reverb-tone, very low and wide, with a faint distant choir-hush. SFX — a soft single footstep-echo on stone at 3.1s (long natural tail), a delicate crystalline shimmer as the vial facets catch light at 0.7s, a low organ-swell rising under 3.0–6.0s. Reaction — a soft awed inhale at 2.6s. VO — none. The master track enters here soft and ambient (low and subtle, never full).

DURATION: 6 seconds (the clip plays the full 6s at real-time natural speed).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, real-time playback at natural speed (no slow-motion), 180° shutter, natural motion blur.

LIP-SYNC: none — silent, lips softly parted in awe.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, double-exposure unless intended, lip-sync drift, audio desync, wardrobe drift between shots, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (velvet/hair/dust), premature transform, mannequin posture, frozen background, identity flicker.

## Frame 2 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

TRANSFORM KEYFRAME NOTE: the stained-glass light-fracture transform. START KEYFRAME (locked) — Aira mid-nave in the deep sapphire silk-velvet gown, face fully recognizable, caught at the instant a broad jewel-coloured shaft strikes her. CROSSING (the only impossible beat) — the shaft shatters into a travelling lattice of faceted stained-glass light-shards that sweep diagonally across her body; where each shard passes, the sapphire velvet re-forms into a glittering jewel-mosaic of hand-beaded ruby, emerald and sapphire tiles set in fine gold cloisonné lines. END KEYFRAME (locked) — Aira in the finished jewel-mosaic beaded gown, the new look fully resolved, new AND unmistakably her. Identity, bone structure and hair colour ride through untouched; the light-fracture covers only the crossing; gown weight, drape, light and shadow obey real physics on both sides; no double-Aira, no face morph, no melt.

WARDROBE: mid-transform — the lower body still deep sapphire silk-velvet, the upper body already re-formed into a jewel-mosaic beaded bodice of ruby, emerald and sapphire tiles in gold cloisonné, a clean diagonal seam of travelling coloured light dividing the two halves; fully modest high neckline and long sleeves, the beadwork throwing hundreds of tiny jewel speculars; fabric immaculate, the velvet and the beadwork both reading with real weight.

HAIR (Sleek Low Chignon): unchanged through the crossing — the polished centre-part low knot holds, glossy and smooth with the loose face-framing strands intact, now catching multicoloured glints from the passing light-shards; real strand separation under the shine, hair colour locked to the reference.

MAKEUP (Luminous Jewel-Glow): the luminous base now lit by travelling coloured light, the champagne highlight picking up faint jewel reflections, the berry lip and smoked taupe lid unchanged; skin dewy and real with visible pores, the glow read as reflected light not added gloss.

HANDS & NAILS: the vial lowered slightly to waist height in one hand as the light sweeps up her body, fingers relaxed; the cut glass scattering the coloured shards into tiny caustics across her forearm; almond nails in glazed rose-nude gloss, neat cuticles.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: lips parting on a small awed breath as the light crosses her, eyes widening a hair with wonder, a soft delighted lift at the brows; jewel-coloured catchlights multiplying briefly in each eye; alive and reacting, never frozen.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: caught mid-step, weight transferring forward onto the front leg, torso opening a few degrees toward the light, spine long, one arm easing out from the body as the beadwork forms — dynamic but balanced, living stillness.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) the diagonal light-seam travelling up her body; (2) individual stained-glass shards sweeping and refracting; (3) the velvet hem still settling from her step; (4) beadwork tiles catching and releasing jewel speculars in sequence; (5) a face-framing strand lifting in the moving air; (6) coloured caustics from the vial crawling her forearm; (7) chest rising on the awed breath; (8) fine coloured dust scattering off the shard-front.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the vial and hand at waist, scattering caustics, sharp. MIDGROUND — Aira mid-transform, the diagonal light-seam dividing velvet and mosaic. BACKGROUND — the stained-glass windows now blazing brighter as the source of the fracture, coloured shafts crossing the nave, soft glowing runway behind.

LIGHTING: KEY — the shattered jewel-light shaft, now an active travelling source raking across her. FILL — soft stone-bounce. RIM — cool backlight holding her silhouette through the busy light. PRACTICAL — the stained-glass windows blazing as the in-frame motivation. SEPARATION — the bright shard-front haloing the transition. BOUNCE — warm card keeping the lower velvet from going black.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; full-figure, slightly low angle to add grandeur, the diagonal light-seam leading the eye, 12% headroom.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A full-figure transform hero from a slightly low angle with about 12% headroom, the diagonal transform-line of the stained-glass cathedral leading the eye. Her body caught mid-turn, weight transferring onto the front foot, torso opening toward the lens, one arm beginning the transform gesture. Camera low for elegance, the complete figure in frame in the stained-glass cathedral, clean negative space. She is centred, caught mid-motion rather than posed. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm, f/2.2; her face and the light-seam tack sharp, the nave soft, coloured bokeh off the windows; gentle bloom on the shard-front, refraction sparkles scattering.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: the signature transform beat — a single elegant impossible crossing, jewel-lit, cinematic and share-worthy.

ATMOSPHERE: breathtaking, magical-but-believable — light itself re-dressing her.

COLOR GRADE: luminous cinematic jewel-tone — saturated sapphire/ruby/emerald shards over warm stone, rich airy blacks, soft bloom (cinematic lane).

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: each beadwork tile shows a faceted glassy edge and a pin specular; the gold cloisonné lines read as fine raised metal; the velvet keeps real pile direction below the seam; coloured caustics ripple believably; glass-skin micro-texture with peach-fuzz catching the moving light.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, low-res patches, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI artifacts, watermarks, signature, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts, amputated fingertips, cross-eyed, lazy eye, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mannequin-stiff posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, double-Aira, face morph during transform, melted beadwork.

## Frame 2 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: full-figure transform hero, slightly low angle.

LENS: 35mm, f/2.2.

SHOT BREAKDOWN (timed, 6s · real-time, continuous energetic motion — never slow-motion, never a static hold; expression eye-led and identity-safe):
- [00:00–00:02] Full-figure from a slightly low angle: a slow controlled arc is already rising with her as the jewel-shaft strikes and shatters into travelling stained-glass shards; gaze catching the fracturing light, eyes widening a hair.
- [00:02–00:04] The arc tracks the diagonal light-seam sweeping up her body, sapphire velvet re-forming into jewel-mosaic beadwork as it passes; an awed breath, brows lifting in wonder.
- [00:04–00:06] The last shard clears overhead and the finished jewel-mosaic gown settles as the arc eases; a small luminous smile landing, eyes alight on the resolved beadwork.

LIGHTING: the shattered jewel-shaft as a live travelling key, cool rim, soft stone fill; the windows blazing brighter through the beat then easing.

ENVIRONMENT: cathedral nave, blazing stained-glass windows, crossing coloured shafts, scattering coloured dust.

AUDIO: diegetic-plus-design, no spoken word. Ambient bed — the cathedral reverb-tone swelling with a fuller choir-rise under the crossing. SFX — a bright crystalline shatter-chime as the shaft fractures at 0.3s, a layered glassy shimmer sweeping up 1.5–4.0s tracking the seam, a soft settling bell-tone as the gown resolves at 5.6s. Reaction — a soft awed gasp at 1.4s. VO — none. Master track lifts gently under the transform then eases (subtle, never full).

DURATION: 6 seconds (the clip plays the full 6s at real-time natural speed).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, real-time playback at natural speed (no slow-motion), 180° shutter, natural motion blur.

LIP-SYNC: none — lips part on the awed breath, no words.

NEGATIVE: morphing (outside the locked transform), identity drift, face morph, double-Aira, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, lip-sync drift, audio desync, wardrobe drift outside the transform, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (velvet/beadwork/light-shards), mannequin posture, frozen background, identity flicker.

## Frame 3 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

WARDROBE: (resolved) — the full jewel-mosaic beaded gown, ruby/emerald/sapphire tiles in gold cloisonné catching the window light, fully modest high neckline and long sleeves, the beadwork sitting with real weight and a soft sway at the hem.

HAIR (Sleek Low Chignon): the polished centre-part low knot, glossy and smooth, loose face-framing strands soft, jewel-glints riding the shine; real strand separation, hair colour locked to the reference.

MAKEUP (Luminous Jewel-Glow): luminous satin base, champagne highlight lit by a warm shaft, soft berry lip, smoked taupe lid, brushed brows; dewy real skin with visible pores and peach-fuzz.

HANDS & NAILS: the hero beat — she tilts the faceted "Lumière Sacrée" vial and presses a single luminous radiance-drop to the high of her cheekbone with one fingertip, the drop catching the jewel light; other hand cradling the vial; almond nails in glazed rose-nude gloss, neat cuticles, natural nail-bed colour.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: eyes lowered softly to the drop with serene focus then a small private smile beginning, lips just parted, brows relaxed; clean jewel catchlights; calm and alive.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: three-quarter to camera, weight settled, the application hand raised to the cheekbone with soft wrist tension, the other forearm bringing the vial into frame, spine long and serene.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) the radiance-drop catching and releasing a tiny specular as it is pressed; (2) the warm liquid still rocking gently inside the tilted vial; (3) a face-framing strand drifting a few millimetres; (4) beadwork tiles glinting in slow sequence as she breathes; (5) chest rising on a soft breath; (6) coloured dust turning in the shaft behind; (7) a soft caustic from the vial on her collarbone; (8) a slow content blink.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the vial and the application fingertip with the radiance-drop, tack sharp, the product label forward. MIDGROUND — Aira's face and beaded bodice. BACKGROUND — a softly glowing stained-glass window behind, coloured shaft falling across stone.

LIGHTING: KEY — a soft warm jewel-shaft on the face. FILL — gentle stone-bounce. RIM — cool backlight on hair and shoulder. PRACTICAL — stained-glass window glow. SEPARATION — the shaft haloing her. BOUNCE — warm card lifting the vial glass and the drop.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; beauty close, chest-up, 10% headroom, the vial entering lower-third, clean space camera-right.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A beauty close-up, chest-up, product-at-face with about 10% headroom, the vial entering the lower third. Her torso at a three-quarter angle to camera, the application hand raised to the cheekbone with soft wrist tension. Camera is near at beauty distance, negative space camera-right, the stained-glass cathedral soft behind. Only head, shoulders and the raised hand are in frame — a three-quarter, intimate product beat, not a profile or full figure. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 85mm, f/2.2; the near eye, the fingertip drop and the vial label tack sharp, the window melting to soft coloured bokeh; tiny refraction sparkle off the cut glass.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: luxury beauty product-at-face hero — the radiance-drop moment, luminous and tactile.

ATMOSPHERE: intimate, radiant, premium — the product as the source of her glow.

COLOR GRADE: luminous cinematic jewel-tone — warm jewel key, saturated coloured bloom behind, rich airy blacks (cinematic lane).

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: the radiance-drop reads as a real luminous bead of serum with a wet specular and faint sub-surface glow; the frosted-then-faceted vial shows cut-glass refraction and a clean label window; beadwork tiles read faceted with gold cloisonné edges; glass-skin micro-texture with peach-fuzz; one faint coloured caustic on the collarbone.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled label text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, low-res patches, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI artifacts, watermarks, signature, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts, amputated fingertips, cross-eyed, lazy eye, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mannequin-stiff posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, smeared product, fake-looking drop.

## Frame 3 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: beauty close, chest-up, product-at-face.

LENS: 85mm, f/2.2.

SHOT BREAKDOWN (timed, 6s · real-time, continuous energetic motion — never slow-motion, never a static hold; expression eye-led and identity-safe):
- [00:00–00:02] Beauty close, chest-up at a three-quarter: a slow push toward her cheekbone is already gliding in as she tilts the vial and brings a luminous radiance-drop on her fingertip toward her face; eyes lowered to the drop in serene focus.
- [00:02–00:04] She presses the drop to the high cheekbone and it catches the jewel light, the push settling; a small private smile beginning, lashes lowering.
- [00:04–00:06] She lowers the hand a touch and lifts her eyes softly, the beadwork glinting, a content glow in her gaze.

LIGHTING: warm jewel-shaft key, cool rim, soft stone fill; a live specular travelling on the vial and the drop as she moves.

ENVIRONMENT: cathedral nave, glowing stained-glass window behind, coloured shaft on stone.

AUDIO: diegetic-plus-design, no spoken word. Ambient bed — soft cathedral reverb-tone, low choir-hush. SFX — a delicate liquid-tap as the dropper settles at 0.5s, a soft skin-press touch at 2.5s, a faint crystalline glow-shimmer as the drop catches light at 3.1s. Reaction — a soft contented breath at 4.1s. VO — none. Master track stays low and ambient (subtle, never full).

DURATION: 6 seconds (the clip plays the full 6s at real-time natural speed).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, real-time playback at natural speed (no slow-motion), 180° shutter, natural motion blur.

LIP-SYNC: none — a soft closed-lip smile.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, lip-sync drift, audio desync, wardrobe drift between shots, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (liquid/skin/glass), mannequin posture, frozen background, identity flicker.

## Frame 4 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

WARDROBE: (resolved) — the jewel-mosaic beaded gown, ruby/emerald/sapphire tiles in gold cloisonné, fully modest high neckline and long sleeves, the beadwork catching the window light with hundreds of tiny speculars; fabric immaculate with real weight.

HAIR (Sleek Low Chignon): polished centre-part low knot, glossy and smooth, soft loose face-framing strands, jewel-glints in the shine; real strand separation, hair colour locked to the reference.

# CONCEPT 52 — PORCELAIN ATELIER / LIQUID-GLAZE COUTURE

Title: Pillar 1 — Contemporary Vivid

Format: Commercial Beauty Transformation — liquid-porcelain glaze-set transform

Hero Product: "Porcelain Veil" blurring glow primer — a smooth matte-ceramic pot with a blush-pink lid and a soft pearl finish

Setting: a bright airy porcelain atelier — white plinths, blush peonies in fluted vases, soft north-window daylight, subtle blue-and-white china motifs

Wardrobe: soft blush silk slip dress (start) → transforms via liquid-porcelain glaze into a sculptural white porcelain gown with delicate cobalt blue-and-white china patterning

Hair: Low Sculpted Waves with a centre part

Makeup: Porcelain Soft-Matte Glow (blurred-but-real skin, rosy cheek, soft rose lip)

Movement: graceful turn → liquid-porcelain glaze pour-and-set transform → product blur-veil hero

Concept Line: "smooth as porcelain"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: SERENE → polished

Composition: clean symmetrical atelier, soft daylight, blush-and-white palette with cobalt accents

Grade: bright commercial-beauty — clean airy whites, soft blush, crisp cobalt accents, rich-but-open blacks (override)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "smooth as porcelain." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + blush slip; end = sculptural porcelain gown, new AND clearly her; the glaze covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light and fabric obey real physics.

## Frame 1 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium-full three-quarter hero beside the plinth.

LENS: 50mm, f/2.5.

- [00:04–00:06] She settles mid-turn, weight rolling onto the front foot, a serene closed-lip calm holding as the silk sways to rest.

# CONCEPT 53 — CLOCKWORK GILDED / AUTOMATON COUTURE

Title: Pillar 4 — Opulent Maximalist

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — clockwork gear-assembly transform

Hero Product: "Rouage d'Or" radiance oil — an amber apothecary dropper bottle with a brass collar and a tiny engraved gear motif

Setting: a warm brass clockwork atelier — giant slow-turning gears, amber gaslight, floating cogs and clock-hands, rich mahogany and gold

Wardrobe: a fitted bronze-silk underdress (start) → transforms via clockwork gear-assembly into an ornate gilded couture gown with brass filigree gearwork and clock-hand detailing

Hair: Sculpted Victorian Updo, centre part

Makeup: Warm Gilded Glow (bronze-lit highlight, soft copper lip)

Movement: a slow turn → clockwork gear-assembly transform → product golden-light hero

Concept Line: "beauty, like clockwork"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: PRECISE → opulent

Composition: symmetrical clockwork atelier, giant gears framing, warm amber pools of light

Grade: warm cinematic gold — deep amber and brass, rich mahogany shadow, gilded highlights, rich airy blacks (cinematic lane)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "beauty, like clockwork." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + bronze underdress; end = gilded clockwork couture gown, new AND clearly her; the gear-assembly covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light and fabric obey real physics.

Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. No heavy drums, no genre shifts, no lyrics; loop-safe in and out, resolving back to A minor for the seam.

# CONCEPT 54 — FERROFLUID OBSIDIAN / LIQUID-MAGNETIC COUTURE

Title: Pillar 7 — Avant-Garde Futurist

Format: High-Fashion Beauty Transformation — ferrofluid magnetic-spike sheet transform

Hero Product: "Obsidian Veil" liquid-glass serum — a faceted black-glass bottle with a chrome dropper collar

Setting: a sleek dark mirror-floor studio — obsidian surfaces, cool chrome rim-light, a single overhead spotlight, faint cool haze

Wardrobe: a sleek charcoal column slip (start) → transforms via ferrofluid magnetic-spike sheet into a sculptural liquid-obsidian gown with chrome-silver spike detailing

Hair: Sleek Wet-Look Centre Part

Makeup: Chrome-Smoke Editorial (cool smoked eye, chrome highlight, soft mauve lip)

Movement: a slow turn → ferrofluid spike-sheet transform → product liquid-glass hero

Concept Line: "power, poured on"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: BOLD → electric

Composition: centred hero on mirror-floor, single spotlight, deep negative space

Grade: cool editorial — obsidian black, chrome silver, cool steel highlights, deep rich blacks, controlled specular (cinematic lane, cool)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "power, poured on." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + charcoal slip; end = sculptural liquid-obsidian gown, new AND clearly her; the ferrofluid sheet covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light and fabric obey real physics.

# CONCEPT 55 — EMBROIDERY ATELIER / THREAD STITCH-FORM COUTURE

Title: Pillar 3 — Heritage Luxe

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — embroidery thread stitch-form transform

Hero Product: "Soie" silk lip oil — a slim clear-glass wand tube with a rose-gold cap and a glossy rose-gold oil

Setting: a sunlit haute-couture embroidery atelier — warm ivory walls, skeins of silk and gold thread, embroidery hoops, soft window light, rose and gold tones

Wardrobe: a soft ivory silk slip (start) → transforms via embroidery thread stitch-form into an ornate gold-and-rose embroidered couture gown with floral goldwork

Hair: Soft Romantic Half-Updo, centre part

Makeup: Soft Rose-Gold Glow (rosy glow, soft glossy rose lip)

Movement: a slow turn → embroidery thread stitch-form transform → product lip-oil glide hero

Concept Line: "spun by hand"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: ROMANTIC → radiant

Composition: soft symmetrical atelier, warm window light, ivory-and-rose-gold palette

Grade: warm bright heritage — soft ivory, rose-gold, warm sunlight, rich-but-open blacks (warm bright lane, – leaning)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "spun by hand." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + ivory slip; end = embroidered gold-and-rose couture gown, new AND clearly her; the thread stitch-form covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light and fabric obey real physics.

# CONCEPT 56 — CRYSTAL GEODE / AMETHYST CRYSTALLINE COUTURE

Title: Pillar 9 — Surreal Dreamscape

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — crystal-geode growth transform

Hero Product: "Quartz Mist" luminous setting essence — a faceted clear-crystal bottle with a silver atomizer cap

Setting: a luminous crystal cavern studio — geode walls, amethyst and quartz clusters, cool violet glow with warm candle-like pinpoints, faint drifting mist

Wardrobe: a pale lilac silk slip (start) → transforms via crystal-geode growth into a faceted amethyst-and-quartz crystalline gown with prismatic edges

Hair: Sleek Low Chignon with a fine crystal pin

Makeup: Prismatic Crystal Glow (cool dewy glow, iridescent highlight, soft mauve-pink lip)

Movement: a slow turn → crystal-geode growth transform → product mist-spritz hero

Concept Line: "clarity, crystallized"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: ETHEREAL → radiant

Composition: centred hero in the geode cavern, cool violet glow, deep crystalline depth

Grade: cool jewel ethereal — amethyst violet, quartz clear, cool silver, rich-but-open blacks, prismatic speculars (cinematic lane, cool jewel)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "clarity, crystallized." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + lilac slip; end = faceted crystalline gown, new AND clearly her; the crystal growth covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light and fabric obey real physics.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, lip-sync drift, audio desync, wardrobe drift between shots, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (glow/shards/fabric), loop-seam mismatch, visible jump-cut, mannequin posture, frozen background, identity flicker.

### 🎵 Master Track Brief (External Audio Layer)

MASTER TRACK BRIEF (Gemini Music — paste with the finished 30s crystal reel): Genre — cool ethereal ambient-orchestral with glass-harmonica, celeste and soft strings; mood — serene rising to luminous. Tempo — around 80 BPM. Key — B minor (cool, ethereal). Arc — 0:00–0:11 a soft glass-harmonica-and-celeste motif over cool low strings with a faint crystalline shimmer under the opening and the crystal-geode transform; 0:11–0:20 a cool string-and-celeste line lifting under the mist beat and the spoken line, ducking low so "clarity, crystallized." sits clear on top; 0:20–0:25 a cool wide string-and-glass-bell swell cresting under the prism-burst (its fullest moment, still restrained and never overpowering); 0:25–0:30 resolving back to the soft glass-harmonica and celeste it began on for a seamless loop. Keep it low and subtle throughout, always under the VO and SFX — a cool emotional bed, never a full-volume track. No drums, no genre shifts, no lyrics; loop-safe in and out on B minor.

# CONCEPT 57 — NEON CITY / LIQUID-LIGHT NEON-TUBE COUTURE

Title: Pillar 8 — Neo-Tokyo Vivid

Format: High-Energy Beauty Transformation — liquid-light neon-tube fill transform

Hero Product: "Neon Gloss" high-shine lip lacquer — a sleek transparent square bottle with a chrome wand and an electric-clear gloss

Setting: a rain-slick neon city rooftop at night — glowing signage, magenta-and-cyan reflections on wet ground, soft drizzle, deep bokeh city lights

Wardrobe: a sleek matte-black bodysuit with a sheer high-neck panel and tailored trousers (start) → transforms via liquid-light neon-tube fill into a glowing electric couture gown of clear glass-tube channels filled with magenta-and-cyan neon

Hair: High Sleek Wet-Look Ponytail

Makeup: Neon Graphic Glow (dewy base, a sharp cyan-to-magenta graphic liner accent, glossy lip)

Movement: a slow turn → liquid-light neon-tube fill transform → product gloss-swipe hero

Concept Line: "turn it on"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: ELECTRIC → euphoric

Composition: centred hero on the wet rooftop, neon glow and city bokeh, deep negative space

Grade: vivid neon night — electric magenta, cyan, deep wet blacks, saturated signage glow (cinematic-vivid lane)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "turn it on." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + matte-black bodysuit; end = glowing electric neon-tube gown, new AND clearly her; the neon-tube fill covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light, rain and fabric obey real physics.

# CONCEPT 58 — BYZANTINE MOSAIC / GOLD-AND-JEWEL TESSERA COUTURE

Title: Pillar 6 — Gilded Heritage

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — mosaic tessera-assembly transform

Hero Product: "Gilded Balm" illuminating balm — a small round gold-lidded glass pot with a warm jewel-toned balm and fine gold-fleck shimmer

Setting: a warm candlelit Byzantine mosaic chapel-studio — antique-gold mosaic walls with lapis-and-teal tesserae, flickering candle warmth, soft incense haze

Wardrobe: an ivory silk slip (start) → transforms via gold-and-jewel mosaic tessera assembly into a shimmering Byzantine mosaic gown of tiny lapis, teal and antique-gold glass tesserae

Hair: Braided Crown Updo with a thin gold filet

Makeup: Gilded Byzantine Glow (warm gold-leaf inner-eye accent, soft bronze lid, deep berry lip)

Movement: a slow turn → mosaic tessera-assembly transform → product balm-tap hero

Concept Line: "set in gold"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: OPULENT → radiant

Composition: centred hero in the mosaic chapel, candle-warm glow, deep jewel depth

Grade: warm gilded jewel — antique gold, lapis blue, teal, deep candle-warm shadows (cinematic lane, warm jewel)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "set in gold." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + ivory slip; end = jewel-and-gold mosaic gown, new AND clearly her; the tessera assembly covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light, candle-flame and fabric obey real physics.

## Frame 1 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT

MAKEUP (Gilded Byzantine Glow): a warm luminous base, a soft bronze wash on the lid with a fine gold-leaf accent at the inner eye, fine lashes, brushed-up brows, a warm gold highlight on the cheekbone and brow-bone catching candlelight, a deep berry lip, inner-corner gold brightener; dewy real skin with visible pores and fine vellus texture (glow from light, never plastic).

# CONCEPT 59 — GRECIAN MARBLE / LIQUID-MARBLE SCULPT COUTURE

Title: Pillar 4 — Sculptural Minimalist

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — liquid-marble sculpt-and-set transform

Hero Product: "Marble" pressed highlighter — a round marble-print compact with a fine brush and a soft pearl-champagne powder

Setting: a bright sunlit sculptor's atelier / Grecian marble gallery — white marble columns and plinths, soft daylight from high windows, fine marble dust turning in the light beams

Wardrobe: a soft draped oatmeal-linen grecian slip (start) → transforms via liquid-marble sculpt into a sculpted white-and-grey-veined marble grecian gown with carved drapery folds

Hair: Sculptural Finger-Wave Low Bun (Grecian)

Makeup: Sculpted Marble Glow (matte-luminous stone base, soft grey-taupe contour, nude lip, dewy highlight)

Movement: a slow turn → liquid-marble sculpt transform → product highlighter brush-sweep hero

Concept Line: "carved to last"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: SCULPTURAL serene → luminous

Composition: centred hero among the marble columns, clean daylight, deep airy depth

Grade: bright sculptural stone — warm white marble, soft grey veining, sage accent, clean daylight (cinematic-bright lane, –3 leaning)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "carved to last." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + oatmeal-linen slip; end = sculpted veined-marble gown, new AND clearly her; the marble sculpt covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light, dust and fabric obey real physics.

## Frame 1 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: medium-full three-quarter hero among the marble columns.

LENS: 50mm, f/2.5.

SHOT BREAKDOWN (timed, 6s · real-time, continuous energetic motion — never slow-motion, never a static hold; expression eye-led and identity-safe):
- [00:00–00:02] Medium-full three-quarter hero among the white marble columns: a slow push-in is already gliding toward her as she holds the compact to her collarbone, the oatmeal linen breathing and marble dust drifting through the daylight beam; she lifts her eyes to lens with a calm sculptural smile.
- [00:02–00:04] The push continues as she begins a graceful quarter-turn, a soft matte highlight travelling the linen; gaze easing to lens, lashes soft.
- [00:04–00:06] She settles mid-turn, weight rolling onto the front foot, a serene sculptural calm holding as a column gleams behind.

LIGHTING: soft clean daylight key, soft white fill, daylight rim; the window light steady.

ENVIRONMENT: sunlit sculptor's atelier, white marble columns, drifting marble dust, daylight beams.

AUDIO: diegetic-plus-design, no spoken word. Ambient bed — a low airy atelier room-tone with a faint distant chisel-tap, very low and steady. SFX — a soft compact-lid tap as her fingers settle at 0.5s, a faint linen shift at 3.1s, a soft airy chime accent on the turn at 3.6s. Reaction — a soft breath at 2.6s. VO — none. The master track enters here soft and ambient (low and subtle, never full).

DURATION: 6 seconds (the clip plays the full 6s at real-time natural speed).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, real-time playback at natural speed (no slow-motion), 180° shutter, natural motion blur.

LIP-SYNC: none — a calm closed-lip smile.

NEGATIVE: morphing, warping, identity drift, limb teleport, object pop-in, frame skip, mirrored composition, text overlay, watermark, AI artifact, ghosting, double-exposure unless intended, lip-sync drift, audio desync, wardrobe drift between shots, unmotivated camera shake, physics violation (slip/hair/dust), premature transform, mannequin posture, frozen background, identity flicker.

## Frame 2 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

TRANSFORM KEYFRAME NOTE: the liquid-marble sculpt transform. START KEYFRAME (locked) — Aira mid-turn in the oatmeal-linen slip, face fully recognizable, caught as the first veil of liquid white marble washes up the hem and begins to set. CROSSING (the only impossible beat) — a flow of liquid white-and-grey-veined marble climbs and wraps her form, hardening along carved drapery folds into a sculpted Grecian marble gown, fine grey veins drawing themselves through the setting stone. END KEYFRAME (locked) — Aira in the finished veined-marble grecian gown, the new look fully resolved, new AND unmistakably her. Identity, bone structure and hair colour ride through untouched; the marble sculpt covers only the crossing; gown weight, drape, light and shadow obey real physics on both sides; no double-Aira, no face morph, no melt.

WARDROBE: mid-transform — the lower body still oatmeal linen, the bodice and one drape already set into white-and-grey-veined marble with carved folds, a clean rising tide-line where liquid marble climbs and hardens; fully modest high neckline and long line, the fresh stone throwing soft cool speculars; linen and marble both reading with real weight.

HAIR (Sculptural Finger-Wave Low Bun): unchanged through the crossing — the finger-waves and smooth low bun hold, polished and neat, now catching a soft cool light-glint from the setting marble; individual strands still real under the sheen, hair colour locked to the reference.

MAKEUP (Sculpted Marble Glow): the stone-smooth base now picking up a cooler bounce from the marble, grey-taupe contour and dewy pearl highlight unchanged, nude lip; skin still real with visible pores and peach-fuzz.

HANDS & NAILS: one hand lifting away as the marble sets up past it, fingers relaxed and clear of the hardening edge; almond nails in soft pearl-nude gloss, neat cuticles, natural nail-bed colour.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: lips parting on a small awed breath as the marble sets, eyes following the stone climbing her form with calm wonder, a gentle brow lift; soft daylight catchlights; alive and reacting, never frozen.

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: caught mid-turn, weight transferring onto the front foot, torso opening toward camera, one arm easing out as the gown sculpts in — graceful and balanced, living stillness.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) a tide of liquid marble climbing and setting along carved folds; (2) fine grey veins drawing themselves through the hardening stone; (3) the linen hem still settling from her turn below the rising marble; (4) a set marble fold catching a soft cool specular as it locks; (5) a soft tendril lifting a touch in the moving air; (6) cool speculars travelling the new stone; (7) chest rising on the awed breath; (8) fine marble dust turning in the daylight beam at the bodice edge.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — the rising marble tide-line and the lifted hand, sharp. MIDGROUND — Aira mid-transform, the tide-line dividing linen and marble. BACKGROUND — the sunlit atelier softly blurred, bright columns, drifting marble dust, daylight beams.

LIGHTING: KEY — soft clean daylight, now with a cool kick raking the setting marble. FILL — a white bounce keeping the lower linen readable. RIM — a soft daylight rim on hair and shoulder. PRACTICAL — the bright windows and sunlit marble. SEPARATION — the brighter daylight gradient behind. BOUNCE — a white card keeping the lower linen from going flat.

FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16; full-figure, slightly low angle for grandeur, the rising marble leading the eye up, 12% headroom.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A full-figure transform hero from a slightly low angle with about 12% headroom, the diagonal transform-line of the grecian marble leading the eye. Her body caught mid-turn, weight transferring onto the front foot, torso opening toward the lens, one arm beginning the transform gesture. Camera low for elegance, the complete figure in frame in the grecian marble, clean negative space. She is centred, caught mid-motion rather than posed. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 50mm, f/2.5; her face and the setting bodice tack sharp, the atelier a bright stone field, soft bokeh off the dust motes; clean highlight roll-off on the marble, no clipping.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: the signature transform beat — a single structured impossible liquid-marble sculpt crossing, bright and sculptural, share-worthy.

ATMOSPHERE: sculptural, magical-but-believable — stone sculpting her into couture.

COLOR GRADE: bright sculptural stone — warm white marble, soft grey veining, sage accent, clean daylight (cinematic-bright lane, –3), no teal-orange.

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: the setting marble reads as real polished stone with believable veining, soft tool-sheen and carved fold-edges, hardening with believable thickness; the oatmeal linen keeps real woven drape below the tide-line; dewy real skin micro-texture with peach-fuzz; cool glints scatter from the new stone; fine marble dust drifts in the beams.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, low-res patches, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI artifacts, watermarks, signature, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts, amputated fingertips, cross-eyed, lazy eye, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mannequin-stiff posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, double-Aira, face morph during transform, melting marble, plastic-looking stone.

## Frame 5 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

MAGIC EFFECT — PYGMALION ROSE-FLUSH AWAKENING (the single impossible move): the cool white marble warms and comes alive, a soft rose flush of life spreading through the stone as fine marble-dust motes and soft rose light lift around her. PHASE 1 (ignition, 0.0–0.5s) — a warm rose flush kindles at her heart and the marble there softens to living warmth. PHASE 2 (bloom, 0.5–1.8s) — the rose flush sweeps outward through the whole gown and across her skin, the stone-cool tones warming to living blush, fine marble-dust motes and soft rose light lifting outward, the daylight beams brightening in sympathy. PHASE 3 (drift, 1.2–2.5s) — the dust motes and soft rose light drift outward along real air-currents, each catching a soft daylight or rose pin-specular. PHASE 4 (settle) — a soft sustained living warmth rings her, a gentle rose contact-glow pooling on the marble floor. KEYFRAME LOCK — START: heart kindling, rose warmth igniting in the stone; END: full living rose-flush sustained, motes adrift, recognizable face warmed to life. Only the awakening is impossible; gravity, daylight, drape, shadow and skin all obey real physics; no gravity-fail, no double-Aira, no blown highlights.

Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. # CONCEPT 60 — BOTANICAL PRESSED-FLOWER RESIN / BLOOM-IN-RESIN COUTURE

Title: Pillar 5 — Romantic Botanical

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — pressed-flower resin set-and-suspend transform

Hero Product: "Petal Tint" liquid blush — a small clear glass bottle with a doe-foot applicator and a soft rosy-coral tint

Setting: a bright botanical pressing studio / sunlit greenhouse-atelier — pressed-flower glass frames, hanging dried blooms, potted greenery, soft daylight through tall glass, fresh petals drifting in the light

Wardrobe: a soft sage-green silk slip (start) → transforms via pressed-flower resin into a translucent clear-resin gown with real petals and blossoms suspended inside its glassy panels

Hair: Soft Romantic Low Knot with loose face-framing tendrils

Makeup: Fresh Petal Glow (dewy skin, soft coral wash, glossy tinted lip, sunlit highlight)

Movement: a slow turn → pressed-flower resin transform → product liquid-blush dab-and-blend hero

Concept Line: "in full bloom"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: FRESH romantic → radiant

Composition: centred hero among the greenery and glass frames, sunlit, deep botanical depth

Grade: fresh botanical bright — clear resin, soft greens, blush-coral petals, warm honey resin-light, clean daylight (cinematic-bright lane, –3 leaning)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "in full bloom." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + sage-green slip; end = pressed-flower resin gown, new AND clearly her; the resin set covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light, petals and fabric obey real physics.

NEGATIVE: mirrored, flipped, inverted, extra limbs, fused fingers, melted features, asymmetric eyes (unintentional), garbled text, floating shadows, duplicated subjects, low-res patches, plastic skin, over-smoothed skin, oversharpened, AI artifacts, watermarks, signature, deformed hands, malformed teeth, joint cuts, amputated fingertips, cross-eyed, lazy eye, off-axis pupils, melted clothing, mannequin-stiff posture, dead eyes, statue-frozen energy, blown highlights, flat petal overlay, gravity-fail.

## Frame 5 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

Reaction — a soft awed breath at 1.9s. VO — none. Master track rises to its fullest-but-still-restrained moment under the burst then eases (subtle, never full).

# CONCEPT 61 — MOONLIT GOSSAMER WEB / DEW-SPUN SILK COUTURE

Title: Pillar 11 — Ethereal Nocturne

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — gossamer spider-silk dew-web spin-and-set transform

Hero Product: "Moondew" hydrating essence — a frosted-silver glass bottle with a press-pump and a clear pearlescent essence

Setting: a moonlit blue-hour dew garden — dew-laden grasses and night-blooming flowers, fine ground-mist, a low silver moon, soft cool light, dewdrops glinting on gossamer strands

Wardrobe: a soft pale-silver silk slip (start) → transforms via gossamer spider-silk into an intricate dew-jewelled web-lace gown with dewdrops beaded along its fine threads

Hair: Soft Moonlit Waves, half-swept, with fine face-framing pieces

Makeup: Moonlit Dew Glow (cool luminous skin, soft silver-lilac wash, dewy highlight, soft rose lip)

Movement: a slow turn → gossamer dew-web spin transform → product essence press-and-pat hero

Concept Line: "woven by moonlight"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: ETHEREAL serene → luminous

Composition: centred hero in the moonlit dew garden, cool soft light, deep nocturnal depth

Grade: moonlit nocturne — cool silver-blue, dew-clear, soft sage, deep blue shadows, clean luminous speculars (cinematic lane, luminous-cool, no murk)

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "woven by moonlight." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + pale-silver slip; end = dew-jewelled web-lace gown, new AND clearly her; the web spin covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light, mist and fabric obey real physics.

# CONCEPT 62 — SPUN-SUGAR PATISSERIE / CONFECTION COUTURE

Title: Pillar 10 — Playful Confection

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — molten spun-sugar spin-and-pull set transform

Hero Product: "Soufflé" soft-focus pressed powder — a pastel-rose compact with a plush puff and a fine cream powder

Setting: an elegant pastel patisserie atelier — marble counter, glass cake domes, copper accents, soft pastry-shop daylight, faint sugar-dust drifting in the air

Wardrobe: a soft cream silk slip (start) → transforms via molten spun-sugar into a delicate spun-sugar gown with translucent pastel caramel-glass panels

Hair: Soft Pastel Bouffant Half-Up, with a soft cream ribbon

Makeup: Soft Sugar Glow (cream soft-focus skin, pastel-rose wash, soft glow, glossy pink lip)

Movement: a slow turn → spun-sugar spin-and-pull transform → product powder puff press-and-roll hero

Concept Line: "soft as sugar"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: PLAYFUL sweet → radiant

Composition: centred hero in the pastel patisserie, soft warm daylight, clean confectionery depth

Grade: warm pastel confectionery bright — cream, pastel rose, pistachio, soft caramel, clean daylight (cinematic-bright lane, –3), no teal-orange

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "soft as sugar." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + cream slip; end = spun-sugar gown, new AND clearly her; the sugar spin covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light, dust and fabric obey real physics.

BACKGROUND — the pastel patisserie restored, marble counter, glass cake domes, copper accents, soft daylight, sugar-dust — the opening tableau.

## Frame 6 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

- [00:04–00:06] She lifts her eyes softly to the lens, landing precisely on the Frame 1 pose, weight settled in the patisserie — a seamless loop seam.

Master track resolves and eases to the soft ambient level it began on for a clean loop (subtle, never full).

### 🎵 Master Track Brief (External Audio Layer)

MASTER TRACK BRIEF (Gemini Music — paste with the finished 30s patisserie reel): Genre — playful light-cinematic with pizzicato strings, celeste, glockenspiel and light woodwinds; mood — sweet rising to radiant. Tempo — around 108 BPM. Key — B♭ major (warm, playful). Arc — 0:00–0:11 a light pizzicato-and-celeste motif over a soft woodwind pad under the opening and the spun-sugar transform; 0:11–0:20 a warm glockenspiel-and-woodwind line lifting under the powder beat and the spoken line, ducking low so "soft as sugar." sits clear on top; 0:20–0:25 a bright pizzicato-and-glockenspiel swell cresting under the spun-sugar dusting-burst (its fullest moment, still restrained and never overpowering); 0:25–0:30 resolving back to the light pizzicato-and-celeste it began on for a seamless loop. Keep it low and subtle throughout, always under the VO and SFX — a sweet airy bed, never a full-volume track. No drums, no genre shifts, no lyrics; loop-safe in and out on B♭ major.

# CONCEPT 63 — LACE ATELIER / CHANTILLY LACE-KNIT COUTURE

Title: Pillar 1 — Timeless Couture

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — floating-needle Chantilly lace-knit set transform

Hero Product: "Veil" lengthening mascara — a slim champagne tube with a fine spoolie wand and a soft black formula

Setting: a refined haute-couture lace atelier — bolts of fine lace, wooden bobbins, dress forms, soft warm atelier daylight, drifting fibre-motes

Wardrobe: a soft ivory silk slip (start) → transforms via floating-needle lace-knitting into an intricate Chantilly lace gown

Hair: Soft Vintage Side-Wave Chignon

Makeup: Soft Ivory Couture Glow (luminous ivory skin, soft champagne wash, defined lashes, soft rosewood lip)

Movement: a slow turn → floating-needle lace-knit transform → product mascara lash-coat hero

Concept Line: "every thread in place"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: ELEGANT poised → luminous

Composition: centred hero in the lace atelier, soft warm light, refined couture depth

Grade: warm ivory couture bright — ivory, champagne, soft taupe, blush, clean warm daylight (cinematic-bright lane, –3), no teal-orange

Spoken line: lands Frame 4 — "every thread in place." (English, natural Indian accent)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + ivory slip; end = Chantilly lace gown, new AND clearly her; the lace-knit covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light, fibre and fabric obey real physics.

Master track resolves and eases to the soft ambient level it began on for a clean loop (subtle, never full).

### 🎵 Master Track Brief (External Audio Layer)

MASTER TRACK BRIEF (Gemini Music — paste with the finished 30s lace-atelier reel): Genre — elegant warm-cinematic with soft felt-piano, warm strings and a gentle celeste; mood — poised rising to luminous. Tempo — around 82 BPM. Key — A♭ major (warm, elegant). Arc — 0:00–0:11 a soft felt-piano-and-celeste motif over a warm string pad under the opening and the lace-knit transform; 0:11–0:20 a warm string line lifting under the mascara beat and the spoken line, ducking low so "every thread in place." sits clear on top; 0:20–0:25 a wide warm string-and-piano swell cresting under the watercolour colour-wash bloom (its fullest moment, still restrained and never overpowering); 0:25–0:30 resolving back to the soft felt-piano-and-celeste it began on for a seamless loop. # CONCEPT 64 — ICE ATELIER / CARVED-CRYSTAL-ICE COUTURE (SILENT)

Title: Pillar 6 — Avant-Garde Sculptural

Format: Cinematic Beauty Transformation — carved-crystal-ice sculpt set transform — fully silent reel

Hero Product: "Glacé" cryo facial roller — a chilled stainless dual-roller with a frosted handle and a faint cold mist clinging to the metal

Setting: a frozen ice atelier / glass conservatory — carved clear-ice blocks, an ice-sculpting plinth, cold vapor pooling low, pale cool daylight through frosted glass, drifting ice-motes

Wardrobe: a pale silver-grey silk slip (start) → transforms via carved-crystal-ice sculpting into a faceted clear-ice gown

Hair: Sleek Glacial Centre-Part Low Twist

Makeup: Cool Crystalline Glow (icy luminous skin, cool silver-pearl wash, frost-clean lash, soft cool-rose lip)

Movement: a slow turn → carved-crystal-ice sculpt transform → product cryo-roller glide hero

Concept Line (on-theme, NOT spoken): "clear as ice"

Duration: 30 seconds | 6 frames

Mood: COOL composed → luminous

Composition: centred hero in the ice atelier, cool crystalline light, sculptural depth

Grade: cool crystalline bright — icy white, pale ice-blue, silver, soft frost-grey, clean cool light (cinematic bright-cool lane, –3), no teal-orange

Spoken line: NONE — fully silent reel, no VO; visuals + sound design carry it (Frame 4 is a wordless direct-to-lens beauty beat)

Audio note: per-frame in-video AUDIO is diegetic-plus-design with no spoken word on any frame; a separate 🎵 Master Track Brief follows the final frame (low and subtle, never full).

Identity safety: the transform locks BOTH keyframes — start = pre-transform recognizable face + silver-grey slip; end = faceted clear-ice gown, new AND clearly her; the ice-sculpt covers only the crossing; only the named transform is impossible, all light, vapor and fabric obey real physics.

## Frame 5 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

VISUAL-LEAD NOTE (silent reel): this is the climax of a wordless reel — push the spectacle: a full-frame crystalline light event, maximal cold sparkle, dramatic refraction and a commanding hero silhouette, all carried on image and sound design with zero dialogue.

MAGIC EFFECT — CRYSTALLINE SUN-CATCH SPARKLE-BLOOM (the single impossible move): a shaft of low cool sun strikes the faceted ice gown and ignites a swirling bloom of fine glinting ice-spark motes and a brief cold-vapor curl haloing her — white-cold sparkle, not a rainbow prism-fan. PHASE 1 (ignition, 0.0–0.5s) — a single facet at her shoulder catches the sun and throws a first bright cold spark with a hard pin-star. PHASE 2 (burst, 0.5–1.8s) — the light races facet to facet across the whole gown and releases a swirling cloud of fine glinting ice-spark motes upward and outward, a cold-vapor curl rising with them, cold caustics sweeping the floor. PHASE 3 (drift, 1.2–2.5s) — the ice-sparks swirl and drift outward along real air-currents, each grain catching a tiny cold specular. PHASE 4 (settle) — a soft sustained halo of slowly falling ice-sparks rings her, a gentle cool sparkle-light pooling around her. KEYFRAME LOCK — START: shoulder-facet catching sun, first spark thrown; END: full sparkle-bloom sustained, ice-sparks adrift, recognizable face radiant. Only the sparkle-bloom is impossible; gravity, light, drape, shadow and skin all obey real physics; no gravity-fail, no double-Aira, no blown highlights.

WARDROBE: (resolved) — the faceted clear-ice gown alive with cold sparks racing its facets, every plane glinting and throwing caustics, fully modest high neckline and long line; form immaculate with real weight and a soft sway.

HAIR (Sleek Glacial Centre-Part Low Twist): centre-part and low twist holding, fine pieces lifting a touch in the swirling cold air, catching a cold sparkle; real strands, hair colour locked to the reference.

MAKEUP (Cool Crystalline Glow): icy base at peak radiance lit by the burst, cool silver-pearl wash brightening, cool-rose lip, cool glow; real skin with visible pores and peach-fuzz.

HANDS & NAILS: one hand opening softly toward the shoulder where the first spark throws, the other easing out as the sparks swirl up; almond nails in cool pearl gloss, neat cuticles.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: lips parted on a soft awed breath becoming a radiant cool smile, eyes lifting with bright wonder as the sparks swirl, brows lifted a hair; cool multiplied catchlights; luminous and alive (no speech).

BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: a slight regal back-lean as the burst crests, chest open, spine long, weight grounded on both feet, arms easing outward — a commanding hero silhouette, serene and radiant.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): (1) a swirling cloud of fine ice-sparks rising and drifting outward; (2) the cold light racing facet to facet across the gown in sweeping sequence; (3) a cold-vapor curl rising behind; (4) fine pieces lifting in the swirling cold air; (5) chest rising on the awed breath; (6) cold speculars and caustics travelling the glinting facets; (7) soft sparkle-shadows dappling across the ice floor; (8) a gentle cool sparkle-light pooling at her feet.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FOREGROUND — her open hand toward the shoulder where the spark throws, sharp. MIDGROUND — Aira haloed by the sparkle-bloom and swirling ice-sparks, the hero. BACKGROUND — the ice atelier alive with cool light, carved-ice blocks glinting, an airy depth receding.

LIGHTING: KEY — a shaft of low cool sun lifted for the beat, bright across the gown. FILL — pale bounce from the lit ice floor. RIM — a cool backlight holding her silhouette inside the swirl. PRACTICAL — the frosted-glass daylight and cold underglow. SEPARATION — the swirling ice-spark halo framing her against the cool field. BOUNCE — a white card sustaining skin and ice.

SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: A full-figure magical hero from a slightly low angle, generous space above for the bloom, the halo centred on her and the ice atelier glowing around her. ### 🎵 Master Track Brief (External Audio Layer)

MASTER TRACK BRIEF (Gemini Music — paste with the finished 30s silent ice-atelier reel): Genre — cool crystalline-cinematic with glass-bells, bowed strings, a cold airy pad and a faint glassy plucked motif; mood — composed rising to luminous. Because this reel is fully silent (no VO), the track and sound design carry the whole emotional arc — give it a touch more presence and shape than a voiced reel, while still sitting under the SFX and never going full. Tempo — around 104 BPM. Key — F minor (cool, crystalline). Arc — 0:00–0:11 a glassy plucked motif over a cold airy pad under the opening and the carved-ice transform; 0:11–0:20 a bowed-string line lifting under the cryo-roller beat and the wordless Frame-4 look, swelling a little more than usual to fill the silence; 0:20–0:25 a bright glass-bell-and-string swell cresting under the sun-catch sparkle-bloom (its fullest moment, still restrained and never overpowering the SFX); 0:25–0:30 resolving back to the glassy plucked motif it began on for a seamless loop. Keep it low and subtle throughout, always under the SFX — a cool crystalline bed, never a full-volume track. No drums, no genre shifts, no lyrics; loop-safe in and out on F minor.
